title: Invalid Date error in Date & Time node
symptom: The workflow fails with an 'Invalid Date' error when processing date-time values, causing subsequent nodes to fail as well.
applies_when: Input date format does not match expected format
not_this_if: Date & Time node is configured correctly with matching input format
root_cause: The Date & Time node is unable to parse the incoming date string due to mismatched field names or incorrect date formats. This leads to an 'Invalid Date' output, which causes downstream nodes to fail.
fix_steps: Open the Date & Time node settings
Check the field it is trying to read from
Ensure the incoming date string format matches the expected format
Adjust the timezone settings if necessary
agent_instruction: Verify and adjust the Date & Time node settings to ensure proper date parsing.
